title: Minimum Sum Of Values By Dividing Array
description: Partition nums into exactly len(andValues) nonempty contiguous groups with prescribed bitwise ANDs; minimize the sum of group last elements, or return -1. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: nums: list[int], andValues: list[int]. 1 <= len(nums) <= 10000; 1 <= len(andValues) <= 10; values are nonnegative and < 100000.
output_contract: Return integer using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
